title: plan.MaxUsers doesn't match seats visible on UI

posts.author: emli13 (Emil Libera)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
For one of my customer monday.com API returns 480 maxUsers.

I use the following endpoint: https://api.monday.com/v2
Body:

 { "query": "query {users { account {plan { max_users period tier version } } } }" }

However, the monday.com UI website shows 482 seats.

96453a7b-c1b9-4919-9ee3-02a4d8ffc8cc823×254 10.8 KB

How is it possible that plan.maxUsers does not match the seats visible in the monday.com UI?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @emli13 and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

Please fill this form with this data + the account ID of the client + your account ID where the app was built + the app ID and we will take a look into it!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: emli13 (Emil Libera)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for the link to the form. However, I will not be filling it out. The customer shared one more screenshot

And now it’s obvious that somehow he was granted two free seats.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again @emli13,

Thank you for letting us know!!
